languages.text: "Анализ..." {n}Ферренц ненадолго прерывается.{/n} "Недостаточно данных. Зафиксирован интенсивный приток Движущей Силы к имплантационному трону Сектора Бионика. Зафиксировано нарушение катехизиса эксплуатации и обслуживания и ограничение доступа техножрецов. При этом ранг жизнеформы "Эоганн Фебрус" слишком велик, чтобы ему можно было воспрепятствовать без вмешательства жизнеформы "Лорд-капитан".

"Analysis..." {n}Ferrenz pauses briefly.{/n} "Insufficient data. A high influx of the Motive Force to the Sector Bionica's implantation throne has been detected. Violations of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation have been recorded, along with restricted access for other Tech-Priests. However, the rank of the life-form designated 'Eogunn Februs' is too high to be impeded without intervention from the life-form designated 'Lord Captain.'"
languages.original_text: "Анализ..." {n}Ферренц ненадолго прерывается.{/n} "Недостаточно данных. Зафиксирован интенсивный приток Движущей Силы к имплантационному трону Сектора Бионика. Зафиксировано нарушение катехизиса эксплуатации и обслуживания и ограничение доступа техножрецов. При этом ранг жизнеформы "Эоганн Фебрус" слишком велик, чтобы ему можно было воспрепятствовать без вмешательства жизнеформы "Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: "Analysis..." {n}Ferrenz pauses briefly.{/n} "Insufficient data. An intensive influx of the Motive Force to the Sector Bionica's implantation throne has been recorded. Violations of the catechism of operation and maintenance have been recorded, along with restricted access for other Tech-Priests. However, the life-form designation 'Eogunn Februs' holds too high a rank to be impeded without intervention from the life-form designation 'Lord Captain'."

"Analysis..." {n}Ferrenz pauses briefly.{/n} "Insufficient data. A high influx of the Motive Force to the Sector Bionica's implantation throne has been detected. Violations of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation have been recorded, along with restricted access for other Tech-Priests. However, the rank of the life-form designated 'Eogunn Februs' is too high to be impeded without intervention from the life-form designated 'Lord Captain'."

"Analysing..." {n}Ferrenz pauses briefly.{/n} "Insufficient data. Intense surges of Motive Force to the Sector Bionica's central unit have been detected. Violation of maintenance catechisms and restriction of enginseer access have been recorded. In addition, the rank of unit 'Eo-gann Februs' is sufficiently high that he can only be curtailed with the Lord Captain's intervention."

"Analysis..." {n}Ferrenz pauses briefly.{/n} "Insufficient data. An intensive influx of the Motive Force to the Sector Bionica's implantation throne has been recorded. Violations of the catechism of operation and maintenance have been recorded, along with restricted access for other Tech-Priests. However, the life-form designation 'Eogunn Februs' holds too high a rank to be impeded without intervention from the life-form designation 'Lord Captain'."

"Analysis..." {n}Ferrenz pauses briefly.{/n} "Insufficient data. A high influx of the Motive Force to the Sector Bionica's implantation throne has been detected. Violations of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation have been recorded, along with restricted access for other Tech-Priests. However, the rank of the life-form designated 'Eogunn Februs' is too high to be impeded without intervention from the life-form designated 'Lord Captain'."

languages.text: “分析中……”{n}费伦茨短暂停顿了一下。{/n}“数据不足。检测到大量源力异常流向仿生区移植王座。同时记录到多项违反《操作与维护原理》，以及限制其他技术神甫访问的行为。然而伊奥贡·费布鲁斯单位的权限等级过高，需由舰长大人亲自介入。”
languages.original_text: "Analysis..." {n}Ferrenz pauses briefly.{/n} "Insufficient data. A high influx of the Motive Force to the Sector Bionica's implantation throne has been detected. Violations of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation have been recorded, along with restricted access for other Tech-Priests. However, the rank of the life-form designated 'Eogunn Februs' is too high to be impeded without intervention from the life-form designated 'Lord Captain.'"

traits.locale_text: “分析中……”{n}费伦茨短暂停顿了一下。{/n}“数据不足。检测到大量源力异常流向仿生区移植王座。同时记录到多项违反《操作与维护原理》，以及限制其他技术神甫访问的行为。然而伊奥贡·费布鲁斯单位的权限等级过高，需由舰长大人亲自介入。”

languages.text: «Análizando...». {n}Ferrenz hace una breve pausa.{/n} «Datos insuficientes. Se ha detectado una gran cantidad de Fuerza Motriz dirigida al trono de implantación del Sector Bionica. Se han registrado infracciones del catequismo de operación y mantenimiento, junto con restricciones de acceso a otros tecnosacerdotes. Sin embargo, el rango de la forma de vida designada "Eogunn Februs" es demasiado alto como para interferir sin la intervención de la forma de vida "Lord Capitán"».
languages.original_text: "Analysis..." {n}Ferrenz pauses briefly.{/n} "Insufficient data. A high influx of the Motive Force to the Sector Bionica's implantation throne has been detected. Violations of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation have been recorded, along with restricted access for other Tech-Priests. However, the rank of the life-form designated 'Eogunn Februs' is too high to be impeded without intervention from the life-form designated 'Lord Captain.'"

traits.locale_text: «Análizando...». {n}Ferrenz hace una breve pausa.{/n} «Datos insuficientes. Se ha detectado una gran cantidad de Fuerza Motriz dirigida al trono de implantación del Sector Bionica. Se han registrado infracciones del catequismo de operación y mantenimiento, junto con restricciones de acceso a otros tecnosacerdotes. Sin embargo, el rango de la forma de vida designada "Eogunn Februs" es demasiado alto como para interferir sin la intervención de la forma de vida "Lord Capitán"».

languages.text: « Analyse... »{n}Ferrenz s'interrompt un bref instant.{/n} « Données insuffisantes. Une hausse inhabituelle de la Force Motrice a été détectée dans le fauteuil d'implantation du secteur Bionica. Le Catéchisme des Opérations et de la Maintenance a été enfreint et l'accès des technoprêtres restreint. Pour une question de rang, seule l'entité désignée sous le nom de "{mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}" peut intervenir pour mettre un terme aux agissements de l'entité "Eogunn Februs". »
languages.original_text: "Analysis..." {n}Ferrenz pauses briefly.{/n} "Insufficient data. A high influx of the Motive Force to the Sector Bionica's implantation throne has been detected. Violations of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation have been recorded, along with restricted access for other Tech-Priests. However, the rank of the life-form designated 'Eogunn Februs' is too high to be impeded without intervention from the life-form designated 'Lord Captain.'"

traits.locale_text: Analyse... {n}Ferrenz s'interrompt un bref instant.{/n} « Données insuffisantes. Une hausse inhabituelle de la Force Motrice a été détectée dans le fauteuil d'implantation du secteur Bionica. Le Catéchisme des Opérations et de la Maintenance a été enfreint et l'accès des technoprêtres restreint. Pour une question de rang, seule l'entité désignée sous le nom de "{mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}" peut intervenir pour mettre un terme aux agissements de l'entité "Eogunn Februs". »

languages.text: "Analiz..." {n}Ferrenz, kısa bir süre duraklıyor.{/n} "Yetersiz veri. Sektör Biyonika'nın implantasyon tahtına yüksek bir Devinim Gücü akışı tespit edildi. Diğer Tekno Rahiplerin erişiminin kısıtlanmasının yanı sıra Bakım ve Faaliyet İlmihâli'nin ihlalleri kaydedildi. Ancak 'Eogunn Februs' olarak adlandırılan yaşam formunun rütbesi, 'Lord Kaptan' olarak adlandırılan yaşam formunun müdahalesi olmadan engellenemeyecek kadar yüksek."
languages.original_text: "Analysis..." {n}Ferrenz pauses briefly.{/n} "Insufficient data. A high influx of the Motive Force to the Sector Bionica's implantation throne has been detected. Violations of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation have been recorded, along with restricted access for other Tech-Priests. However, the rank of the life-form designated 'Eogunn Februs' is too high to be impeded without intervention from the life-form designated 'Lord Captain.'"

traits.locale_text: "Analiz..." {n}Ferrenz, kısa bir süre duraklıyor.{/n} "Yetersiz veri. Sektör Biyonika'nın implantasyon tahtına yüksek bir Devinim Gücü akışı tespit edildi. Diğer Tekno Rahiplerin erişiminin kısıtlanmasının yanı sıra Bakım ve Faaliyet İlmihâli'nin ihlalleri kaydedildi. Ancak 'Eogunn Februs' olarak adlandırılan yaşam formunun rütbesi, 'Lord Kaptan' olarak adlandırılan yaşam formunun müdahalesi olmadan engellenemeyecek kadar yüksek."

languages.text: "Analysiere ..." {n}Ferrenz macht eine kurze Pause.{/n} "Unzureichende Daten. Es wurde ein hoher Zustrom von Antriebskraft in den Implantationsthron von Sektor Bionica festgestellt. Verstöße gegen den Katechismus von Betrieb und Wartung wurden ebenso verzeichnet wie die Sperrung des Zugangs für andere Techpriester. Allerdings kann gegen die Lebensform 'Eogunn Februs' aufgrund ihres hohen Ranges ohne die Intervention der Lebensform 'Lord Captain' nicht vorgegangen werden."
languages.original_text: "Analysis..." {n}Ferrenz pauses briefly.{/n} "Insufficient data. A high influx of the Motive Force to the Sector Bionica's implantation throne has been detected. Violations of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation have been recorded, along with restricted access for other Tech-Priests. However, the rank of the life-form designated 'Eogunn Februs' is too high to be impeded without intervention from the life-form designated 'Lord Captain.'"

traits.locale_text: "Analysiere ..." {n}Ferrenz macht eine kurze Pause.{/n} "Unzureichende Daten. Es wurde ein hoher Zustrom von Antriebskraft in den Implantationsthron von Sektor Bionica festgestellt. Verstöße gegen den Katechismus von Betrieb und Wartung wurden ebenso verzeichnet wie die Sperrung des Zugangs für andere Techpriester. Allerdings kann gegen die Lebensform 'Eogunn Februs' aufgrund ihres hohen Ranges ohne die Intervention der Lebensform 'Lord Captain' nicht vorgegangen werden."

languages.text: 「分析中…」{n}フェレンツが一瞬止まる。{/n}「データ不足。セクター・ビオニカの中央ユニットに動機力の激しい突発的な増幅が検知された。保守規範の違反とエンジニアのアクセス制限が記録されている。さらに、ユニット「エオガン・フェブルス」の階級は十分に高く、大隊長による介入なしには制約できない。」
languages.original_text: "Analysing..." {n}Ferrenz pauses briefly.{/n} "Insufficient data. Intense surges of Motive Force to the Sector Bionica's central unit have been detected. Violation of maintenance catechisms and restriction of Enginseer access have been recorded. In addition, the rank of unit 'Eogunn Februs' is sufficiently high that he can only be curtailed with the Lord Captain's intervention."

traits.locale_text: 「分析中…」{n}フェレンツが一瞬止まる。「データ不足。セクター・ビオニカの中央ユニットに動機力の激しい突発的な増幅が検知された。保守規範の違反とエンジニアのアクセス制限が記録されている。さらに、ユニット「エオ・ガン・フェブルス」の階級は十分に高く、大隊長による介入なしには制約できない。」
